title: Linear steps
mermaid:
flowchart TD

  %% Workflow: linearWorkflow

  start((Start))
  step_1["getUser"]
  step_2["getOrders"]
  step_3["notify"]
  end_node((End))

  %% Edges
  step_1 --> step_2
  step_2 --> step_3
  start --> step_1
  step_3 --> end_node

  %% Styles
  classDef stepStyle fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#01579b

  classDef streamStyle fill:#e0f7fa,stroke:#006064
